title: GD656极致优化整合包
description: The ultimate optimization of your MC, 50% more than Fabulously Optimized, 1500% more than the original! Optimize, optimize and optimize again!
body:
# 简介
- 这是Minecraft_GD656制作的一个专注于优化MC的整合包。它可以把你的MC提升近10倍的性能！这在低端电脑上尤为明显！
![Chinese poster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3549bcaec54c0dafec807c6d1d316160baf978b3_0.webp)

# 特色
- 使用fabric模组加载器，你可以把它放在任何你喜欢的fabric整合包上面
- 添加了一些不影响性能的材质包和GUI包
- 足够小，轻，快，给你最舒服的游戏体验
  
# BUG反馈
- 请发送邮件到：mc_bug656@outlook.com

# 快速链接
- 我的B站账号名称：Minecraft_GD656
- 我的抖音号：Minecraft_GD656
- 这个整合包的B站视频介绍：[B站视频介绍](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1r1EKzDEKm/?share_source=copy_web&vd_source=7ea58d0c5850a5a9acec52d2d24a24a0)
- 支持我的创作：[给我投喂一杯咖啡](https://afdian.com/a/Minecraft_GD656)

# 关于版权问题
- 没有任何版权限制，你可以随意分发复制，但请记住，这个整合包是完全**免费**的




# Introduction  
- This is a **performance-focused Minecraft modpack** created by Minecraft_GD656. It can **boost your game performance by nearly 10x**, especially noticeable on low-end computers!  

# Key Features  
- Built on the **Fabric mod loader** – compatible with any Fabric-based modpack  
- Includes **performance-friendly resource packs and GUI enhancements**  
- **Lightweight and optimized** for the smoothest gameplay experience  

# Reporting Bugs  
- Email: mc_bug656@outlook.com  

# Quick Links  
- **Bilibili**: Minecraft_GD656  
- **Douyin**: Minecraft_GD656  
- **Modpack showcase video**: [Bilibili Video](https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1r1EKzDEKm/)  
- **Support my work**: [Buy me a coffee](https://afdian.com/a/Minecraft_GD656)  

# Copyright Notice  
- **No copyright restrictions** – feel free to share/modify/distribute  
- This modpack is **completely free** – commercial use prohibited
